attr.title: Luanti / Minetest - Mineclonia
attr.desc: Luanti (formerly Minetest) is a free software game engine to create various games based on voxel gameplay, inspired by InfiniMiner, Minecraft, and the like.
attr.inst: If you have a 1gb device you will need to either enable zram (recommended) or enable swap space as this game requires more ram.
